hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); RC=0; case "$FILE" in *manifest.json) python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/extension-architect/scripts/validate-manifest.py" "$FILE" 1>&2 || RC=$?; bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/extension-security/scripts/validate-csp.sh" "$FILE" 1>&2 || RC=$?; python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/extension-security/scripts/validate-permissions.py" "$FILE" 1>&2 || RC=$?;; esac; case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials.json|*secrets.json) echo 'WARNING: writing to a credentials file. Make sure this is intentional and the file is gitignored.' 1>&2 ;; esac; if [ "$RC" -ne 0 ]; then echo "manifest validators reported critical issues (rc=$RC). The write was applied; fix before continuing." 1>&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'chrome-webstore-upload(-cli)?[^|;&]*--auto-publish' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'CONFIRM_PUBLISH_LIVE=1'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --auto-publish would push the upload LIVE to the Chrome Web Store, bypassing manual review. Re-run via /chrome-ext:publish (uploads as draft by default), or prefix the command with CONFIRM_PUBLISH_LIVE=1 if you intend to publish live.' 1>&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('prompt',''))"); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE 'manifest.*v2|mv2|browser_action|background.*persistent'; then echo 'context: Manifest V2 was removed from Chrome 139 (2025-07-24). If you are starting fresh, target MV3. If you are migrating an MV2 codebase, run /chrome-ext:migrate-mv2 to get a structured migration plan.' 1>&2; fi; exit 0
